titleEn: Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky
summaryAm: ፀሐይ፣ ጨረቃ እና ውሃ ስለ ቦታ፣ ጓደኝነት እና የተፈጥሮ ድንቅ የሚያስተምሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ጓደኝነት ቦታን ሲያከብር ሁሉም በራሱ ቦታ ይበራል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ በምድር ላይ ቆንጆ ቤት ነበራቸው።
pages.textEn: Sun and Moon had a beautiful house on the earth.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 1: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ በምድር ላይ ቆንጆ ቤት ነበራቸው።

pages.textAm: ጓደኛቸው ውሃ ሊጎበኛቸው ፈለገ፣ ግን “ቦታ ብዙ ያስፈልገኛል” አለ።
pages.textEn: Their friend Water wanted to visit but said he needed a lot of room.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 2: ጓደኛቸው ውሃ ሊጎበኛቸው ፈለገ፣ ግን “ቦታ ብዙ ያስፈልገኛል” አለ።

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ቤታቸውን አሰፉ፣ በሮችንም ከፈቱ።
pages.textEn: Sun and Moon made their house bigger and opened the doors.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 3: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ቤታቸውን አሰፉ፣ በሮችንም ከፈቱ።

pages.textAm: ውሃ በመጀመሪያ በትንሽ ጠብታዎች በደስታ ገባ። ግን ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ቤቱ ለጓደኛቸው ገና ትንሽ እንደሆነ አዩ።
pages.textEn: Water first came in as little happy drops, and Sun and Moon saw their home was still too small for their friend.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 4: happy water drops entering a house while Sun and Moon notice it is still too small.

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ከቤታቸው ውጭ ቆመው ወደ ላይ ተመለከቱ። “ምናልባት ለሁላችንም ሰፊ ቦታ እንፈልጋለን” አሉ።
pages.textEn: Sun and Moon stood outside, looked upward, and wondered if they needed a wider place for everyone.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 5: Sun and Moon standing outside their house and looking thoughtfully toward the wide sky.

pages.textAm: በሰፊው ቦታ ሥር ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ ለጓደኛቸው ትልቅ ቦታ እንደሚያስፈልግ ተረዱ። ስለዚህ እንደገና በጥንቃቄ ለመዘጋጀት ወሰኑ።
pages.textEn: Under the wide open space, Sun and Moon understood their friend needed room and chose to prepare carefully again.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for Why the Sun and Moon Live in the Sky, page 6: Sun and Moon under a wide open sky planning more room for Water.

pages.textAm: ፀሐይ ቤቱን ሲያሰፋ ጨረቃ ለጓደኛቸው ለስላሳ መንገድ አዘጋጀች። “ጓደኛን መቀበል ቦታን መከበር ይፈልጋል” አሉ።
pages.textEn: Sun and Moon prepared more room and remembered to respect their friend’s needs.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Sun and Moon preparing a wide bright house for Water to visit.

pages.textAm: ውሃ በመጀመሪያ ትንሽ ጠብታዎችን ላከ። ከዚያ ብዙ ወንዞች በደስታ እየዘፈኑ ገቡ።
pages.textEn: Water first sent drops, then cheerful streams came in.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Friendly water drops and streams entering a bright house.

pages.textAm: ቤቱ በውሃ ሲሞላ ፀሐይ እና ጨረቃ በቀስታ ወደ ላይ ተነሱ። እነሱ አልተቆጡም፣ ለሁሉም ሰፊ ቦታ ፈለጉ።
pages.textEn: As the house filled, Sun and Moon calmly rose upward to make room.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Sun and Moon rising gently above a house filled with blue water.

pages.textAm: በሰማይ ውስጥ ፀሐይ ቀኑን በብርሃን አሞቀች። ጨረቃም ሌሊቱን በለስላሳ ብርሃን አሳረፈች።
pages.textEn: In the sky, Sun warmed the day and Moon softened the night.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Sun and Moon glowing in a wide friendly sky.

pages.textAm: ውሃ በምድር ላይ ወንዝ፣ ኩሬ እና ባሕር ሆኖ ቀረ። ሶስቱም ጓደኞች በተለያዩ ቦታ ሆነው አንድ ዓለምን ያስደስቱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Water stayed as rivers, ponds, and seas, and all three friends brightened one world.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Sun, Moon, rivers, ponds, and sea sharing one peaceful world.
